Bash(python -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for t in ['SPY','QQQ','NVDA']: d = data.get\(t,{}\) ek = [k for k in \(d.get\('exp_data'\) or {}\).keys\(\) if k.startswith\('MACRO'\)] mk = ek[0] if ek else list\(\(d.get\('exp_data'\) or {}\).keys\(\)\)[0] if d.get\('exp_data'\) else None if not mk: print\(f'{t}: NO DATA'\); continue ed = d['exp_data'][mk] strikes = ed.get\('strikes',[]\) ks = next\(\(s for s in strikes if s['node_type']=='king'\), None\) total = sum\(abs\(s['net_gex']\) for s in strikes\) or 1 kpct = round\(abs\(ks['net_gex']\)/total*100\) if ks else 0 pg = ed.get\('pos_gex',0\); ng = ed.get\('neg_gex',0\) regime = 'POS' if pg > abs\(ng\) else 'NEG' print\(f'=== {t} ==='\) print\(f' spot={d.get\(\\"spot\\"\)} king={ed.get\(\\"king\\"\)} floor={ed.get\(\\"floor\\"\)} ceil={ed.get\(\\"ceiling\\"\)} zgl={ed.get\(\\"zgl\\"\)}'\) print\(f' kingGex={round\(ks[\\"net_gex\\"]\) if ks else 0} kingPos={ks[\\"net_gex\\"]>=0 if ks else True} kingPct={kpct}%'\) print\(f' regime={regime} posGex={round\(pg\)} negGex={round\(ng\)}'\) print\(f' delta={round\(ed.get\(\\"net_delta\\",0\)\)} vanna={round\(ed.get\(\\"net_vanna\\",0\)\)} iv={round\(ed.get\(\\"iv\\",0\),1\)}'\) print\(f' gatekeepers={ed.get\(\\"gatekeepers\\"\)}'\) print\(f' kingAbove={ed.get\(\\"king\\",0\) > d.get\(\\"spot\\",0\)}'\) ")
